case_title: RICCA, ANGELA vs. SENERIS, PILAR et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICCA, ANGELA AS TO DEFENDANT SENERIS, PILAR DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT SENERIS, PILAR ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES

JUDGE PRO TEM - STUART BRONSTEIN, REPORTER - DIANA CHEN ALL PARTIES PRESENT, CASE SETTLED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SENERIS, PILAR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2489-A FOLSOM ST, S.F. $3,249.00 RENT, $600.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $116.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,965.00, LEASE FORFEITED, EXECUTION STAYED UNLESS DEFT FAILS TO PAY AS FOLLOWS: $800- ON OR BEFORE 6/24/98 OR 7/31/98 (SEE JUDGMENT); $100- EACH & EVERY THURSDAY STARTING 6/18/98. DEFT TO PAY $507- RENT ON OR BEFORE 5TH EACH MONTH STARTING 7/5/98. ALL MONEYS IN CERT FUNDS. SEE JUDGMENT FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
